# name

**Instance Property**

The app’s localized name.

## Declaration

```swift
let name: String
```

## Obtaining general information

- **subtitle**: The app’s localized subtitle.
- **description**: The app’s localized description.
- **fileSize**: The size of the app in bytes.
- **iconURL(fitting:)**: A URL for the icon of the app.
- **screenshotURLs(fitting:)**: An array of the app’s screenshot URLs.

items.description: The size of the app in bytes.
items.name: fileSize

items.name: iconURL(fitting:)
